start.title: An Ominous Beginning
start.text: The path ahead is shrouded in mist and whispers of something old and hungry.

start.title: Ruined Gates
start.text: The broken gate creaks as you step into a place forgotten by time.

start.title: Farewell to Safety
start.text: The last town buildings vanish behind you; only the dungeon remains.

mid.title: Echoing Corridors
mid.text: You hear distant footsteps and the scrape of something that shouldn't exist.

mid.title: Flickering Torches
mid.text: Strange runes glow briefly on the walls. You feel watched.

mid.title: Collapsed Passage
mid.text: A recent collapse blocks the usual path. A hidden tunnel beckons.

mid.title: Guardian Remains
mid.text: Broken armor and spells suggest this place once held a powerful guardian.

mid.title: Cursed Relic
mid.text: A discarded idol radiates dark energy. It may be the key to the boss.

mid.title: Trick of Mirrors
mid.text: Illusions dance at the edge of your vision, making the walls seem alive.

mid.title: Poisonous Fumes
mid.text: The air is thick with unnatural spores; each breath drains your strength.

mid.title: Forgotten Library
mid.text: Dusty tomes whisper secrets of the dungeon’s creation when touched.

mid.title: Telltale Blood
mid.text: A trail of blood leads deeper; its source is not human.

boss.title: Throne of Shadows
boss.text: You stand before a dark throne. The boss waits with blood-red eyes.

boss.title: Heart of the Dungeon
boss.text: A pulsating core of corrupt magic fills the chamber; the final battle begins.

boss.title: The Last Stand
boss.text: Ancient guardians fell here. They whisper one last warning before you fight.

boss.title: Dragon’s Lair
boss.text: Heat and smoke tear at your nostrils, and the actual boss roars in the dark.

boss.title: Crowned Champion
boss.text: A fallen knight rises as the boss, fueled by your approach.
